title: Balaclava
body:
**The Balaclava works like an helmet, but you'll need to right-click with that in your hand to put them on your head.**



**Functions:**
- Hide your  identity in the chat, replacing that with "Anonymous"!
![Chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d006d2b371ea5daae610544eaef624bdbc588c19.png)
- Vanish your nametag, so nobody can recognize who you are!

**Crafting:**

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92adab6365f1a2d01c6806e8c50716bd77cb5bb3.png)

**Languages:**

- English
- Italian
